    A

    actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class src.TilePuzzle
    Checks if the selected tile is adjacent to the blank tile and swaps them.

    D

    Driver - Class in src
     
    Driver() - Constructor for class src.Driver
     

    E

    exchangeImageWith(TilePiece) - Method in class src.TilePiece
    Exchanges the image stored on this tile with the given tile.

    G

    getXPos() - Method in class src.TilePiece
    Gets the x co-ordinate of this tile on the board (the column)
    getYPos() - Method in class src.TilePiece
    Gets the y co-ordinate of this tile on the board (the row)

    I

    isAdjacentTo(TilePiece) - Method in class src.TilePiece
    Determines if a given TilePiece is adjacent to this TilePiece on the board.
    isCorrect() - Method in class src.TilePiece
    Determines if this tile is in its correct (solved position).

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class src.Driver
     

    S

    setGridPosition(int, int) - Method in class src.TilePiece
    Updates the grid position of the tile.
    src - package src
     

    T

    TilePiece - Class in src
    Represents an individual tile in a sliding tile puzzle.
    TilePiece(String, int, int) - Constructor for class src.TilePiece
    Creates an instance of a TilePiece.
    TilePuzzle - Class in src
    Representation of the overall frame in a sliding tile puzzle.
    TilePuzzle() - Constructor for class src.TilePuzzle
    Creates an instance of a TilePuzzle.
